heading: Adjutants general and assistant adjutants general: reference to other officers of National Guard
label: 10214 Adjutants general and assistant adjutants general: reference to other officers of National Guard
text: In any case in which, under the laws of a State, an officer of the National Guard of that jurisdiction, other than the adjutant general or an assistant adjutant general, normally performs the duties of that office, the references in sections 12004(b)(1), 12215, 12642(c), 14507(b), 14508(h), and 14512 of this title to the adjutant general or the assistant adjutant general shall be applied to that officer instead of to the adjutant general or assistant adjutant general.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , prior to repeal by .section 281 of this titlePub. L. 103–337, § 1661(a)(2)(A)
Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided, see , set out as a note under .Dec. 1, 1994section 1691 of Pub. L. 103–337section 10001 of this title
